feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to Bind Applications to Pre-Existing Schemas in HANA Cloud (BTP Cloud Foundry)?
entry.content:
I recently migrated a HANA Service DB (BTP Neo) to HANA Cloud in BTP Cloud Foundry. In this setup, several schemas were created in the HANA Cloud database using a technical user.

Now, we have applications deployed in Cloud Foundry that need to access these schemas. I want to create service bindings between these applications and the pre-existing schemas in HANA Cloud.

Is it possible to create a service instance of type hana with the schema plan for an already existing schema? how can it be achieved?

If not, what would be the recommended approach to bind applications to pre-existing schemas?

entry.title: SAP HANA : Cannot create Instance
entry.content:
Hi, I am trying to install SAP HANA using the MS Azure VM (open suse 15 )
But not able to install
I am getting below error

 


Installing components...
Configuring SAP HANA Database...
Configuring System...
Configuring instance...
Resume of SAP HANA Express Edition Installation failed
Installation of SAP HANA Database failed
Installation failed
error installing

SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud  SAP HANA Cloud

entry.title: Not able to access Table created in SAP HANA Cloud with Datasphere Replication
entry.content:
Hi team,

We are following a scenario for replicating data from Datasphere to SAP HANA Cloud

Created a Replication scenario in Datasphere for a table "KNA1" . This table is visible in our  container schema after replication as below . There are other tables also created in this container schema through CAPM entity creation.

The below table has no name space attached as it is directly created from Replication

Created a hdb procedure in db/src folder of our CAPM project that access the tables from both CAPM created tables and table created with Data sphere Replication .

but while accessing the tables created through Replication we are getting an issue while deploying .

The file requires "db://KNA1" which is not provided by any file [8212001] (STDERR, APP/TASK/deploy)#
Other tables which are created with CAPM framework has no issue when accessed with procedures but only tables created with a Replication scenario of Datasphere in our schema has the issue.
 
Please let us know if we have missed any thing while accessing these tables.
 
Regards
Prasad

entry.title: Issue in fragment/Adobe form in S4 HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP community,

I have created copy of PO form to design custom form in S4 HANA Public cloud Environment. In Dev system Form is working as expected. But when It moved to Test system, the logic written inside the Adobe form is not working. 


if someone has faced has same issue or know the route cause , please help us on this.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Hi sara ,May i know how you resolved the issue
Issue with Error Message Display in RAP Managed Scenario with Unmanaged Save
entry.content: I am working with a managed scenario using an unmanaged save (Late Numbering) and employing BAPI to update data. However, I am facing an issue where error messages do not appear in the event of a failure. Success, information, and warning messages display correctly when there is no error in LT_BAPIRETURN. However, if there is an error message, nothing is shown, and the screen remains unchanged. This issue was working as expected in my development system but is not functioning correctly in other systems. I have attached an image for reference. I also tried passing %pid, but that didn’t resolve the problem.

entry.title: Add mappings is not working in SAP HANA Cloud Instance
entry.content:
Hi,
From the past 1 week, i am getting an error while adding the mappings. But, earlier it was working.
I am only able to map the cloud foundry environment that too while creating the HANA Cloud Instance.
After the creation of HANA Cloud Instance, if i try to map any environment whether Kyma or Cloud Foundry or both, it is showing the below error.
I have created the Hana Cloud Database Instance from Hana Cloud tools and i am working on trial account.

Version
2024.40.8 (QRC 4/2024)
Runtime Environment
Other Environments

Please help me to resolve this issue.

Best Regards,
Abhinav

entry.title: Error While running F.01 "please input Valid company code and Profit Center"
entry.content:
Hi Friends, 

We are in S4HANA. While running F.01 i am getting the error "please input Valid company code and Profit Center", not sure what is the issue. 

No profit center is given as input parameter. 

Input parameters given are Chart of Comp Code, Company code and FSV version and periods for whcih reprot is required. Any help. 

 

Regards,

Venu

entry.title: Could not create instance under may space under Subaccount: trial
entry.content:
In the old version, you can create your instances under the your space; now you only create the instance under the Subaccount: trial. Please see the attachments. How can we link the instances to the dev space under the Subaccount.

Thank you

entry.title: After submitting the change request,when i am checking in workflowlog my workitem id is blank
How to develop a custom outbound API in S/4 HANA Cloud to send XML data?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How to develop a custom outbound API in S/4 HANA Cloud to send business data in XML/JSON format(With deep structures) to external system? We usually do it through a ODATA/REST API or a Proxy call where we do fill the required XML structure fields using ABAP code. I would like to know the approach for "Clean Core".  i.e. How and where do we define this API? How do we schedule this as background job?

Regards,

Rams

entry.title: Re: Could not create instance under may space under Subac...
entry.content:
You created your HANA Cloud for "Other Environments". Normally, you would be able to add an instance mapping to Cloud Foundry but that doesn't work on BTP Trial.

To create HDI containers in your Cloud Foundry space, you'll need to delete your HANA Cloud instance and recreate it in the Cloud Foundry environment. Then, go to your trial subaccount and create a subscription to SAP HANA Cloud and choose the plan "tools" (see screenshot).

 Once the subscription has been created, go to Security -> Role Rollections and assign yourself the roles SAP HANA Cloud Administrator and SAP HANA Cloud Security Administrator.

Then go to the SAP HANA Cloud Central (the tools plan that you've just subscribed to). There, you can create a HANA Cloud instance and choose Cloud Foundry as Runtime Environment:

 Select your space, create it and all wil be as expected.

entry.title: S4HC Public - Payment Status
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I am missing "setup" for connect my own edited PSR format - PAIN_002_001_03 which I can easy edit in MAP FORMAT DATA - for incoming files from Banks.
But there is issue with original file - because its still using and cant be renamed / replaced...
But where is customization to set this new format /Z_PAIN_002_001_03 for example Sender + Payment message type ?

 


Many thanks with help 🙂

Best regards
Jiri Starek

entry.title: Change company code from XYZ to ABC
entry.content:
Hello all, 

We have a requirement to change the company from XYZ to ABC. In real time scenarios does SAP system allows us to change the company code from one to another. If yes, what would be strategy to do it without effecting or impacting the master data and transactional data. 

Here in our we do not have any transactional data posted to this company code. 

can anyone help me with the issue 

Thank you

entry.title: Forecast schedule lines vs. Planned schedule lines in Sales Scheduling Agreements
entry.content:
Hello,

In the context of setting up an EDI interface between our system (Vendor on S4 Hana Cloud) and Customers, we are working with Sales Scheduling Agreements, and with the SOAP webservice schedgagrmtdlivschedule_in to integrate the incoming messages from the Customers.

In the incoming messages coming from the Customers, we are receiving an information for each schedule line, indicating whether it is a "forecast" schedule line (uncertain order) or a "planned" schedule line (certain order).

My issue is that I cannot find any field to write that information in S4. I thought about using texts, but those are only available on the Sales Scheduling Agreement Item level, and not on the schedule line level.

Any help would be greatly appreciated 🙂

entry.title: HowTo: S4H Public Cloud app to start iFlow in SAP CPI by enduser.
entry.content:
Dears,

I kindly ask for idea how to start existing iFlow in SAP CPI from S4H Public Cloud via tail or any other possibility - which way to choose.

Scenario: User opens tail (or something "else") in S4HC, fill some parameters like dates, etc, push button like "Start". This will trigger iFlow in SAP CPI and will pass filled parameters. 

Any idea is appreciated.

Thanks a lot.

Roman

entry.title: SAP Error in Public Cloud: QP256 QM data: Maintain inspection point reference
entry.content:
Hi All
I've created a new Freely Defined Inspection Point in Public Cloud to be quantity based:
Number length 10 1 Quantity in UoM (No other field is populated except Field Combination (ZQ1) and Description.

I then went to Routing and add Operation with Work Center = QMLABS, Control Key QM01 and on Routing Header I added ZQ1 at Insp. Points.

On Operation Details, I selected Quantity, valuation and confirmation (production) for Insp.pointCompletion and No ref. Maintained

When I do a Check, I get error QP256.
In SAP Help, I get this:

For each respective step in the operations for the routing you define,

  • What the inspection interval should be between the inspection points (for instance, 10 minutes or 3 containers)

  • How the quantity should be entered with time-related intervals

  • Whether the last partial lot assignment, which is therefore relevant to goods receipt, takes place during results recording (optional)

I want to have an Inspection Point for every 10th Piece, but not sure where to put this.
I also don't know why I get the error.

Any help will be appreciated as there is not much available for Public Cloud.
Thanx

entry.title: Billing blocks for cancelled deliveries in S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a problem with canceled delivery notes. They appear in the billing list - VF04. In order to not be invoiced and use up the fiscal numbers,we tried to use billing blocks on deliveries but they still appear in billing list. How to handle this case in public cloud? Have we any solution like VL_COMPLETE in public cloud?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Why opening calculation view leads to OOM error when the calc scenario is based on an empty table?
entry.content:
I have a calculation scenario that is being ran on HANA DB. I can create the calculation scenario. However, if I create a calculation view using the calculation scenario. When we open the calculation view through data preview it would lead to an OOM error even when the source table on top of which the calculation scenario is created is empty.

We get the following error in the HANA console when trying to open the calculation view : could not generate more expressions. Here is link to the faulty calculation scenario (it's too long to be pasted here). Is there a limit to how long a calculation scenario can be ? How can someone go on debugging what's wrong with the following calculation scenario or is there a limitation on hana-db calculation engine.

The hana version is 2.00.059.12.1709045428. The calculation scenario is generated using an internal js library.

https://sap-my.sharepoint.com/:w:/p/rafid_pranta/EZeI7iMBSf9BrHnPqe1yhuIBd7Zkvie1qXg1K6j6Jd58JA?e=OOiLiD

entry.title: Unable to move Cross container HANA Cloud artifacts to Quality space in SAP BTP
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have created a calculation view where we have a cross container access to different HDI container and we have created all required config files to connect and it worked well in Dev space and deployment also successful.

Now when we tried to move to Quality space and we are using CTMS in BTP to move to Quality.
We are getting below error while moving to quality space.


"Async operation for service binding between app "zcom__xxxdb1-deployer" and service instance "zcom_XXX-db2" failed with "10009 CF-UnableToPerform bind could not be completed: VCAP::CloudController::V3::LastOperationFailedState".

Any help will be appreciated. Thank you.
 Please find the attached error screenshot for your reference.
